findings.detail: Official evidence labeling tokens are heavily used in connector governance and provenance classifiers by design.
Admin connectors and property detail surfaces include source-label/strength components, indicating intended UI exposure.
Some token hits are generic audit-token scans and indicate broader future evidence intake workflow, not a P2 wiring blocker.
A portion of hits come from proof/history artifacts and not active runtime regression.
Manual evidence upload/review module remains a separate phase and was not implemented in P2.1A-FIX-2 per scope rules.
